## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce GrowthX's AI-powered content creation services to Project Discovery for potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-driven content creation, focusing on SEO-optimized daily publishing without requiring large in-house teams](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Project Discovery is in early growth stages, prioritizing editorial content and messaging refinement before ramping up demand gen](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [GrowthX's service includes an 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing execution ($12K/mo for startups), with potential October start date](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)

## Topics

### Project Discovery's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Rachel Benson: founding marketing hire (since mid-July)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=117.0)
  - [Series A completed, aiming for Series B next year](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Small go-to-market team: 2 in biz dev, 1 in sales](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Priorities:](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
      - [Build marketing funnel](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
      - [Develop SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
      - [Refine messaging and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
      - [Focus on inbound marketing experiments (e.g., whitepapers) before demand gen](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Differentiators

  - [End-to-end AI-powered content creation partner](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Founded by Marcel (ex-marketing leader at IBM, HP, Scale AI, Deepgram)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Key benefits:](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
      - [Daily publishing in client's CMS](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
      - [Optimized for AI search visibility (4.4x more likely to convert, 3x longer engagement)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
      - [Comprehensive, fresh, and heavily researched content](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Faster time-to-value compared to building in-house teams/tools](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)

### GrowthX's Process and Technology

  - [Two-phase approach:](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
    1.  Strategy Sprint (8 weeks, $20K)
          - [Develop key artifacts (audience mindshare, company context, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
          - [Start publishing (20+ articles)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
    2.  Growth Execution (ongoing, $12K/mo for startups)
          - [Daily publishing (10+ articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [AI-powered workflow with human expertise:](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [12+ step content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [Includes brief generation, research, fact-checking, and expert review](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
      - [Leverages multiple APIs and tools behind the scenes](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)

### Client Examples and Results

  - [Abnormal Security, SentinelOne (cybersecurity sector)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [Tally (accounting/tax content)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Augment Code (AI coding platform)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [Ramp (1000+ pages created, including interactive tools)](https://fathom.video/share/s96bzWgC5d6Eh52Fj3hgavde5qXWiqDP?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
